title: Reionization-Era Quasars: A Catalogue of Spectroscopically Confirmed Quasars at z >= 5.3
description: A catalogue of spectroscopically confirmed quasars at redshifts z >= 5.3, compiled for the Saas-Fee Advanced Course 54 book chapter 'Observations of Early Black Holes Before and After JWST'. Includes coordinates, spectroscopic redshifts, UV magnitudes, and discovery/redshift references with ADS bibcodes.

creators.name: Bañados, Eduardo
creators.affiliation: Max Planck Institute for Astronomy, Heidelberg, Germany
